sections_extracted.extracted_content_summary: Pearson Edexcel International GCSE in Physics (4PH1), Issue 4, September 2024, first teaching September 2017.
Two papers: Paper 1 (61.1%, 2h, 110 marks, non-bold/non-P content) and Paper 2 (38.9%, 1h15m, 70 marks, all content including bold/P).
AO1 38-42%, AO2 38-42%, AO3 19-21%; per-paper AO breakdown provided.

8 topics: Forces and motion, Electricity, Waves, Energy resources and energy transfers, Solids liquids and gases, Magnetism and electromagnetism, Radioactivity and particles, Astrophysics. Each topic includes units, sub-topics, specification points, practicals, and bold/P markers.
Command words and definitions used in external assessments.
18 required relationships not provided on exam formula sheet.
Mathematical skills developed and assessed across the qualification.
Circuit symbols used in examination papers.

sections_not_extracted.section: Appendix 2: World Class Qualification design principles

split_recommendations.topics_json: 8 topics from Physics content (p.11-28), with bold/P scope markers.
split_recommendations.assessment_json: Paper 1/2 structure, AO weightings, command words (p.8-9, p.31, p.47-48).
split_recommendations.references: Formulae, circuit symbols, suggested practicals, mathematical skills (p.45-46, p.49, p.51-53).

known_risks: Single-channel text extraction; visual review of high-impact pages pending.
Formula and equation rendering reconstructed from text; visual confirmation recommended.
Official URL and exact retrieved_at not captured in local archive metadata.
Bold/P markers used for Paper scope; downstream tool must correctly interpret them.
notes: Extraction completed without copying official PDF text. Page-map mappings use printed/page numbers.
